{{Infobox location
| name = Sector Seven
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|There is a breach in [[Sector Seven]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Reinforcements from [[Sector Eight]] were denied entrance into [[Sector Seven]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sector Seven]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
